description: Adequate efficacy pool; stub generator returns valid sentences with provenance tokens; all 4 sections verify
pool_full_text: The randomized trial enrolled 1247 adults with chronic migraines. Aspirin 325mg demonstrated significant headache reduction at 18.5% rate vs control. Adverse events were minimal at 8% incidence in outcomes assessment. Limitations include short follow-up duration.
stub_completion_text: The trial enrolled 1247 adults with chronic migraines and showed aspirin headache reduction at 18.5% rate {{TOKEN}}.
